Daytona Beach Restaurant Health Grades

60%Grade A
4.2Avg rating
80Restaurants

Every one of the 80 restaurants in Daytona Beach on this page carries an A–F health grade built from its latest Florida DBPR inspection. 48 hold an A, and the typical diner rating runs 4.2 stars. The list runs best grade first.

Daytona Beach restaurant health grades — FAQ

How are Daytona Beach restaurant health grades calculated?

Florida issues no official grades, so we calculate an A–F score from each restaurant's most recent DBPR inspection — starting at 100 points and deducting for high-priority, intermediate, and basic violations. Of the 80 Daytona Beach restaurants we grade, 48 currently hold an A.

Does Florida assign letter grades to Daytona Beach restaurants?

No. The Florida Department of Business and Professional Regulation (DBPR) inspects restaurants and records violations but does not grade them. The grades shown here are calculated by us from those public inspection records.

How many restaurants are graded in Daytona Beach?

We currently publish 80 graded restaurants in Daytona Beach, with an average diner rating of 4.2 stars; 48 hold an A health grade.

See the full scoring method on our methodology page.

Central Florida Restaurants

Restaurant health inspection grades, dietary options, and diner ratings across Central Florida. Inspection data from Florida DBPR public records.
